adjustments.summary: The approved six-phase implementation program is complete; there is no Phase 7 in the current roadmap.
Live shurjoPay activation, merchant-panel changes, and WordPress IPN cutover remain blocked until explicit approval and provider-contract confirmation are recorded.
Canonical posting must stay disabled until an operator-approved account mapping exists for the legacy transactions surface.
Donor online payments remain blocked until a dedicated donor payable model exists.
Any future live-readiness work must confirm a provider-native callback signature or equivalent authoritative contract before activation.

notes: Phase 6 completed the approved implementation scope and left the repository sandbox-ready for guardian invoice payments only.
Future work, if any, is operational follow-up or newly approved scope rather than an automatic continuation to another implementation phase.
The current hardening pass fixed pending manual-bank resubmission reuse and otherwise preserved the validated Phase 5 sandbox behavior.
